title: HEAD TEACHER'S MESSAGE
name: TWEHEYO SAM
message_preview: I would like to extend my heartfelt gratitude to each and every one of you for entrusting us with the privilege of educating and nurturing your children. We take this responsibility very seriously and are committed to providing a safe, inclusive, and engaging environment where every child can thrive.
image_alt: Portrait of Head Teacher TWEHEYO SAM
